title: Canvas scatter (10k points)
description: Above the 2,000-mark threshold, render: "auto" moves the layer onto a canvas stratum (advisory `canvas-auto`): axes, grid, and the legend stay SVG; the marks raster into one canvas sized by the DPR recipe, paired with an off-screen description block and a data-table toggle. Set render: "svg" or a11y: "force-svg" to opt out.
